productDisplayName: Spykar Men Ranger Checks Black Shirts
description: Composition Black and blue checked shirt made of 100% cotton with yellow and white accents, two chest pockets with buttoned flaps, full hand sleeves with mid-sleeve buttoned flap, buttoned shoulder flaps, front buttoned placket, tipped collar and curved hemline Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water Wash only with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron Checks that add immense style to your casual look is what scullers brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and black footwear to look like the king of casual wear.
